{{Infobox character
| name = Korr
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = advisor
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Korr Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Korr serves as an advisor to [[Indirial]], though his true nature is unclear; he may be a distinct entity that utilizes a gold medallion with an amethyst center as a medium for communication. He is one of thirteen advisors and typically communicates through telepathic whispers that sound cold and dry, or by manifesting violet light and sparks. Korr is not a talkative figure, choosing to remain silent unless he perceives a significant threat. His warnings often manifest as violet flames or flashes that appear in [[Indirial]]'s vision or on his person to signal imminent peril. While he usually resides within [[the House]] of [[Valinhall]], he can be summoned to appear as a medallion worn on a chain. Although he is generally stoic and rarely uses [[Indirial]]'s name or offers apologies, he has demonstrated a capacity for intense worry during moments of extreme danger.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Korr]] provided a warning to [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Korr]] is a presence that can whisper to [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Korr]] resides inside [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Residing within a black gem set in [[Indirial's medallion]], Korr serves as an advisor who communicates by whispering warnings directly into [[Indirial]]'s mind. These warnings manifest as a violet flame appearing in the corner of one's vision. Korr can be summoned from [[Valinhall]] to appear on a gold chain worn around [[Indirial]]'s neck. While dangling from this chain, Korr perceives incoming danger, such as the violet flame seen on the end of [[Zakareth]]'s spear.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]] is an advisor residing inside a black gem in [[Indirial's medallion]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]] provides warnings via a violet flame in the corner of one's vision.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]] whispered into [[Indirial]]'s mind about the danger.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]] can be summoned from [[Valinhall]] to appear on a gold chain around [[Indirial]]'s neck.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]] can perceive danger and sees violet flame on the end of [[Zakareth]]'s spear.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] has [[Korr]] dangling from his neck.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]] provides warnings.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23">''City of Light'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Korr]]'s warning is associated with violet flame.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
